task: Allow explicit Day 1 AI tool switch despite stale UI sync sequence

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence-backed reporting, entrypoint verification, and completion evidence guard for code, UI, deploy, and customer-facing answer changes.
Mac Mini production changes require source-of-truth deploy flow, real user entrypoint verification, and completion evidence guard before reporting complete.

changes: Added a backend guard helper for explicit preferred_llm_changed events.
Session sync now still applies preferred_llm_changed when client_seq is older than the server's latest UI sync sequence.
When accepting a stale preferred_llm_changed event, the backend advances last_client_seq to current_seq + 1 so the accepted user action becomes the latest state.
Added regression coverage that distinguishes explicit LLM switch events from ordinary stale state_sync events.

verification.name: full edu VP training flow tests
edu app production build
verification.result: passed: tsc and vite built dist/assets/index-DImRapPE.js

residual_risk: Mac Mini deploy and production verification are recorded after deployment in this evidence file.
